title: Agent no-delete rail
outcome: policies/agent-bin.policy.toml declares allow/gate/block for bin-report/cleanup and rm/mv/git clean on bin/lib. Profiles keep primary rails and gain rails_bin=agent-bin. Graph: agent -blocked-by-> policy:agent-bin plus three profile -selects-> policy:agent-bin edges. docs/agent-rails.md documents the rail and Kraken deferral. E08 complete (S1–S5).
validation: archon:sync → 4 policies, graph 28/27; validate PASS; agent -blocked-by-> policy:agent-bin present; 3 profile selects edges; DUST_AGENT=1 delete-approved refused.
decisions: rails_bin optional secondary field — preserves primary rails string without breaking migration
runtime interception deferred to Kraken — same boundary as agent-git and secrets
next: H09 — draft sprint/spec (horizon epic; not session-ready)
token_note: enabling — safety prerequisite as one policy + graph edges + script guard
